lesson: Before implementing any issue, run the Pre-Implementation Gate (#400): query the neural DB (`simplicio memory '<domain>'`), load architecture skills by scope (senior-architect / asolaria-agent-table / real-agent-wave-engineering / wave-loop-tokio-integration), and declare a BLOCKER before opening a PR if the DoD needs infra that does not exist.
evidence: wesleysimplicio/simplicio-loop#183 -> PR #391 opened prematurely declaring DoD covered; external review found all gaps (remote durable queue + real Codex/Claude workers + two physical devices missing).

lesson: An issue whose DoD requires durable remote queue + real external workers (Codex/Claude) + physical devices must be declared BLOCKED at triage, not 'implemented' as an isolated PoC. Loading real-agent-wave-engineering + wave-loop-tokio-integration skills before coding surfaces the infra gap immediately.
evidence: simplicio-loop#183 fan-out PoC could not satisfy DoD without remote durable queue and real workers; PR #391 carried a foundation-layer disclaimer.
